hypothesis: Combining EMA crossover with Bollinger Band positioning and Volume Oscillator confirmation creates a robust momentum entry signal that filters out weak breakouts while ensuring sufficient volume support. The Bollinger Band filter ensures entries occur during clear price expansion, and the Volume Oscillator confirms the strength of the move. This combination reduces false signals while maintaining responsiveness to genuine momentum shifts.

Combining EMA crossover with Bollinger band positioning and volume oscillator confirmation creates a robust momentum entry signal that filters out low-quality breakouts while leveraging volatility to set dynamic risk controls.
